What do you do at AVRT? Who do you report to?
Good morning, Izabel. We have a couple of new partners on the call today, joining from Chicago. Could you introduce yourself for them?
Of course. Hi everyone, I am Izabel, the CEO of AVRT here in Brazil. I am in charge of finance and operations.
Great. And who do you report to on the group side?
I report to you and the board. On a daily basis, I deal with cash flow, taxes, and stock control.
Perfect. What would you say is your main challenge right now?
My main challenge is the new tax reform. We came up with a plan to wait before we change the ERP system.
That sounds sensible. The partners will want to hear more about that next week.
Happy to walk them through it. I will send a short summary before the call.
Hi everyone, I am Izabel, the CEO of AVRT.
I am in charge of finance and operations.
I report to Andy and the board.
On a daily basis, I deal with cash flow and taxes.
My main challenge right now is the tax reform.

Hi Izabel, it's Andy. I'm just calling to confirm a few things before Thursday's call. First, I'd like you to walk us through the cash flow for the last month, and then give us a quick update on the ERP project. A couple of the new partners will be on the line, so it's a good chance for them to hear directly from you. The call runs for about forty minutes, and we start at ten your time. If anything comes up before then, just send me a message. Thanks, Izabel. Talk to you Thursday.

Good morning, everyone. For those who don't know me yet, my name is Rachel, and I'm the new operations advisor for the Latin America accounts. I've spent the last twelve years working with technology companies, mostly in supply chain and finance. On a daily basis, I deal with our regional partners and I report directly to the board. I'm really looking forward to working with the team in Brazil. Please feel free to reach out anytime. My door is always open, and I'm happy to help wherever I can. Thank you.
